school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Exactly one of these is true: Biology goes with Mona; French goes with 77%; Music goes with Iris.
Period 4 goes with none of Ellis, Liam, or 77%.
Between Biology and French, one goes with Hale and the other with Kira.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Exactly one of these is true: Benoni goes with Skewer; London goes with 1893; Sicilian goes with Fork.
2nd goes with none of Magnus, Pin, or 1893.
Between Benoni and London, one goes with Nadia and the other with Gambit.
The London player's rating is lower than both Boris' rating and the player who loves the Pin's rating.
Exactly two of these are true: Magnus goes with Benoni; Gambit goes with 1893; Zugzwang goes with 1843.
French goes with exactly two of Skewer, 1893, and 5th.
At least one of Fork goes with Mikhail, Zugzwang goes with 3rd, or London does not go with 1893 if and only if Mikhail does not go with 4th.
Either 3rd goes with Benoni or Fork goes with 1993.
Benoni goes with exactly two of Nadia, Zugzwang, and 1943.
Sicilian goes with exactly one of Gambit, 1793, or 2nd.
Between Benoni and Gambit, one goes with Magnus and the other with Nadia.
